# CTSlicingManager.AppCategory.communication

**Case**

An application category for voice, video calling, and messaging services.

## Declaration

```swift
case communication
```

## Discussion

Communication slices provide optimized routing for voice and video calling, messaging, and other real-time communication services. Use this category for VoIP, video conferencing, and instant messaging applications.

## App categories

- **CTSlicingManager.AppCategory.gaming**: An application category for gaming traffic requiring low latency.
- **CTSlicingManager.AppCategory.streaming**: An application category for audio and video streaming services.
